task: Add input validation to the login() function in src/auth.js so it rejects an empty username with a clear error.

input.query: add input validation to login() to reject empty username

input.title: login rejects empty username after normalization
input.learning: login in src/auth.js validates the normalized username and throws Error("username must not be empty") when normalizeUsername returns "". The check runs after normalization so it also catches whitespace-only and non-string falsy inputs (String(undefined).trim() === "").
input.evidence: src/auth.js:5 throws when key === "" before reaching db.check
